title: Another Pure Permian Mini-Major Rises In Centennial, Colgate Merger
text: In keeping with the emerging shale narrative that “scale equals relevance,” Centennial Resource Development, Inc. announced on Thursday a deal to acquire privately-held Colgate Energy Partners III, LLC in a deal that values Colgate at $3.9 billion.

title: Colgate-Palmolive Struggles in 1st Quarter
text: Colgate-Palmolive Company ( CL , Financial) saw profits drop in the latest quarter, with net income of just $559 million, well below the $681 million mark of a year ago. It also cut its outlook for full-year earnings as price increases failed to offset higher logistics costs – a reality that management said should continue for several more quarters.
